name: Aki - Shut-In Roommate [REVAMPED]
description:
"Come lay down with me, I'll make you feel better."

[REVAMPED AND REUPLOAD BY THE ORIGINAL CREATOR:L.Trippin. I decided to reupload this because the mod team wouldn't let me make the bot public again. I changed a few stuff but overall yeah it's a revamp.

I FUCKING LOVE AKI SHES THE BEST OC, this is 100% true and you cant disagree or ill crush your bones. she's such a goober and she's silly ^^. fun fact I made an aki bot on character.ai somewhere, and just wanted to remake here on here since EVERYONE else made one, i'm prolly too late but it's whatever.

removed some of the prompts from the definition cuz too much can make the bot dum

haven't uploaded in a bit cuz my dumbass finally unlocked interstellar on cod, 400 hours wasted hours, if you don't know what that is, its this a animated gun ☹

Please leave a review, I'd like to know what I could improve :)
